label: What is your name?
description: Please enter your full name as per your ID.

label: What is your email address?
description: We'll send your registration confirmation here.

label: What is your phone number?
description: 📱 For event updates and urgent communication.

label: Which department do you want to participate in?
description: Select the department you want to participate in for the event.

label: Which year are you studying in?
description: Choose your current year of study.

label: Which events do you want to participate in?
description: Select one or more events from each category.

label: Enter the title for each document event
description: For each event that requires a document, please provide the title.

label: Are you registering as a solo performer or a team?
description: Choose 'Solo' if you are performing alone, or 'Team' if you have team members.

label: How many members are in your team?
description: Enter the total number of team members (including yourself).

label: Enter the names of all team members
description: Please enter each member's name, one per line.

label: Consent to Terms and Conditions
description: Please read and accept our terms and conditions to proceed.
options: I agree to the terms and conditions

label: Submit Your Registration
description: Click submit to complete your registration.
success_message: Registration successful! Check your email for confirmation.
